verses.1: Yet listen now, Jacob my servant,
verses.2: This is what the LORD who made you,
verses.3: For I will pour water on him who is thirsty,
verses.4: and they will spring up among the grass,
verses.5: One will say, ‘I am the LORD’s.’
verses.6: This is what the LORD, the King of Israel,
verses.9: Everyone who makes a carved image is vain.
verses.11: Behold, all his fellows will be disappointed;
verses.13: The carpenter stretches out a line.
verses.14: He cuts down cedars for himself,
verses.15: Then it will be for a man to burn;
verses.16: He burns part of it in the fire.
verses.17: The rest of it he makes into a god,
verses.18: They don’t know, neither do they consider,
verses.21: Remember these things, Jacob and Israel,
verses.22: I have blotted out, as a thick cloud, your transgressions,
verses.23: Sing, you heavens, for the LORD has done it!
verses.25: who frustrates the signs of the liars,
verses.26: who confirms the word of his servant,
verses.27: who says to the deep, ‘Be dry,’
verses.28: who says of Cyrus, ‘He is my shepherd, and shall perform all my pleasure,’
